description.ko: 빛나는 거품의 나선과 투명한 해파리 형상이 심해 물결의 고요한 움직임을 드러낸다.
description.en: A calm helix of glowing bubbles and translucent jellyfish forms reveals the quiet motion of deep water.

prompt: Open-water deep sea scene with no visible seabed: a calm suspended lattice of pearl-sized bubbles forms a slow spiral helix through #000080 midnight water, each bubble rim glowing with soft #40E0D0 bioluminescence. Several translucent jellyfish-like bells drift between the bubble paths, their glassy membranes tinted #48D1CC and their short, delicate tendrils bending with visible laminar currents. Fine pressure waves and fluid ribbons curl around the forms, revealing gentle ocean dynamics rather than turbulence. Medium-density luminous plankton particles float in layered depth, with faint #006994 gradients fading into the blackwater background. Serene, meditative deep ocean atmosphere, crisp macro detail, soft volumetric glow, peaceful transparent life moving at a measured pace.
